$comment: Required semantic vocabulary, validated at build time (style-dictionary/validate-schema.js) against every theme×mode combination's resolved output. NEUTRAL roles are supplied by each modes/*.json; BRAND roles resolve through the wiring (semantic/theme-roles.json) from each theme's brand-kit inputs (themes/*.json). Because the axes combine via cascade, a single required list covers the union — if any mode omits a neutral, or a theme omits a brand-kit input a wired role needs, the combined build for that pairing is missing the role and the build fails.
